directive:
Revise the proto_core by replacing every assertion that the conditional-cell vector \(p\) lies in an ordinary total-mass simplex with the product conditional-law polytope
\[
\mathcal C_{n,l}:=\left\{p\in\mathbb R_+^{\mathcal I_{n,l}}:\sum_{y\in\mathcal Y_n}\sum_{d\in\mathcal D}p_{y,d,z}=1\ \text{for every }z\in\mathcal Z_l\right\}.
\]
Systematically audit and correct the symbols, assumptions, `def:iv-law-class`, primal constraints, Background Proposition, target/endpoint functional, sampling model, and every sanity reduction so that no statement imposes or suggests \(\mathbf1^{\mathsf T}p=1\). Explicitly record that \(\mathbf1^{\mathsf T}p=l\). Preserve \(q\) as one probability distribution with \(q\ge0\) and \(\mathbf1^{\mathsf T}q=1\), never \(l\): for each arm \(z\),
\[
\sum_{y,d}(A_{n,l}q)_{y,d,z}
=\sum_{\tau}q_\tau
=1,
\]
because every response type contributes to exactly one \((y,d)\) cell in that arm. Thus \(Aq=p\) supplies all \(l\) armwise normalizations; clarify that the explicit constraint \(\mathbf1^{\mathsf T}q=1\) is redundant once \(p\in\mathcal C_{n,l}\) and \(Aq=p\), and ensure the stated dual is derived consistently with that redundancy. State that empirical \(p\) consists of within-\(Z=z\) conditional frequencies, not joint or globally normalized cell frequencies. Recheck gauge invariance of endpoint values using \(v^{\mathsf T}p=\sum_z a_z=0\).

Also repair the hidden basis-count inconsistency in `def:reverse-search-handle`: \(r=2nl-l+1=\dim\mathcal G_{n,l}\) is the required number of independent tight type equations on the gauge section; an ambient full-rank certificate therefore contains those \(r\) type equations plus the \(l-1\) fixed gauge equations, totaling \(2nl\), not \(r\) equations total or \(2nl-2(l-1)\) type equations. This must agree with the \((2,3)\) witness’s ten type equations plus two gauges.

Retain exactly the source-verified BBAK count \(l((l-1)^n-(l-1))\) and its lower-to-upper conversion only while the definitions remain faithful to arXiv:2604.12802v1, Theorem 4 on pp. 10–11 and the relevant material on p. 67. Otherwise leave the novelty/enumeration kernel and gauge-invariant omitted-witness certificate unchanged.
